server.ts.purpose: Backend Node.js server handling API routes, WebSockets for terminal, and AI chat processing.

functions.executeTerminalCommand: Spawns shell processes and broadcasts output.

App.tsx.purpose: Main React frontend orchestrating Chat, File Explorer, Terminal, and Sidebar UI.

components.ChatMessage: Renders AI/User messages with collapsible thoughts and markdown support.
components.CodeBlock: Handles syntax highlighting and terminal output simulation.

KERNEL_CORE.md.purpose: Hardcoded system protocols and architectural directives.
